title: HPKE sealed-sender from field is unauthenticated — verify via MLS sender identity
description: In tui/src/event.rs SEALED_DELIVER handler, the 64-byte from prefix in the HPKE plaintext is adversary-controlled. HPKE base mode provides no sender auth. The from field must be derived from MLS process_incoming() return value, not from the unsealed prefix. Requires extending MlsClient::process_incoming to return sender leaf identity.
close_reason: HPKE sealed-sender authentication fixed: removed unauthenticated 64-byte pub_id prefix from wire format; process_incoming now returns MLS-authenticated sender credential; all call sites updated; P0 stale comments fixed
